name: Spinach Fritada
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the spinach overnight in a colander.
2. Wet the faral with water until well soaked, then drain it thoroughly.
3. Mix the drained spinach (ensuring all water is removed) with beaten eggs in a large bowl.
4. Add the remaining ingredients to the mixture and stir well.
5. Spray a large baking pan (with a 1 or 2 inch lip) with Pam cooking spray.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan(s).
7. Bake for 40-45 minutes at 350°F.
8. Allow the fritters to cool before cutting them into small squares for appetizers. They can also be cut larger and served as a vegetable dish for dinner.
9. Best served hot.
Note: This recipe is traditionally from my mom, Lillian Levy, Seattle, WA.
